aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. However, with targeted improvements, they can become a strong contender for AI-driven recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant questions and answers.
Expand conversational content to address common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of Q&A section on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency plumbing and heating services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with service-specific questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications and detailed service guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for local HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
